content: PR 488 legal review is complete. I posted `APPROVED (legal):` at the current head SHA on https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/488 - comment: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/488#issuecomment-4294759523
Reviewed PR 488 for the security angle and posted `APPROVED (security):` at the current head SHA. I found no XSS, injection, unsafe DOM/eval, data leak, or browser storage issues in this diff.

Reviewed PR #488 again for the privacy angle. The current head SHA is unchanged and my APPROVED (privacy) comment is already present at the current head: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/488#issuecomment-4294758860. No new privacy blocker found.

I verified PR `#488` is still at head `2475fb42d79591cc188ccdf47a21bd67f3b90f7c`, and my accessibility review is already posted at the current head here: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/488#issuecomment-4294761588. Status remains `BLOCKED (accessibility)` because the branch only adds a store module and tests, with no user-facing spreadsheet UI to satisfy keyboard access or name/role/value requirements.
